lessons.titleSomali: Waxa la jecel yahay iyo waxa aan la jeclayn
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Isticmaal like/likes iyo don’t/doesn’t like si sax ah.
learningObjectives: Faham erayada muhiimka ah ee Waxa la jecel yahay iyo waxa aan la jeclayn.
Isticmaal erayada jumlado English ah oo A1 ah.
Ku tababar hadal, qoraal iyo faham.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Like waxaa loola jeedaa jeclaan. Ku baro jumlad gaaban.
Likes waxaa loola jeedaa wuu/way jecel yahay. Ku baro jumlad gaaban.
Love waxaa loola jeedaa aad u jeclaan. Ku baro jumlad gaaban.
Really like waxaa loola jeedaa aad u jeclaan. Ku baro jumlad gaaban.
Do not like waxaa loola jeedaa aan jeclayn. Ku baro jumlad gaaban.
Does not like waxaa loola jeedaa uusan/aysan jeclayn. Ku baro jumlad gaaban.
Hate waa eray xooggan; si taxaddar leh u isticmaal.

grammar.explanationSomali: Present Simple: I/you/we/they + like; he/she/it + likes. Diidmada waxaa lagu sameeyaa don’t/doesn’t + like.
grammar.rule: Present Simple: I/you/we/they + like; he/she/it + likes. Diidmada waxaa lagu sameeyaa don’t/doesn’t + like.
commonMistakesSomali: She like rice waa khalad; She likes rice ayaa sax ah.
She doesn’t likes waa khalad; She doesn’t like ayaa sax ah.
